chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2661 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «يُكْرَهُ مِنَ اَلطِّيبِ أَرْبَعَةُ أَشْيَاءَ لِلْمُحْرِمِ اَلْمِسْكُ وَ اَلْعَنْبَرُ وَ اَلزَّعْفَرَانُ وَ اَلْوَرْسُ وَ كَانَ يَكْرَهُ مِنَ اَلْأَدْهَانِ اَلطَّيِّبَةَ اَلرِّيحِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2661 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Four types of fragrances are disliked for a Muhrim: musk, ambergris, saffron, and turmeric. He also disliked fragrant oils with a strong scent."
